meta.search_card_policy: Prefer a condensed intro derived from What it is over raw Overview copy for retrieval-facing product cards.

rows.title: Vitamin C Super Serum Plus - Jumbo
rows.review_notes: Pass. Clear product type, active stack, and treatment scope. Strong enough for PDP and card-intro reuse.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A multi-active treatment serum that combines vitamin C, retinol, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, and salicylic acid to target tone, texture, and early signs of aging in one step.

rows.title: Golden Booster Amla Berry Vitamin C Brightening Serum
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The second highlight now explains the dark-spot-leaning brightening angle instead of vague treatment-focus copy.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A brightening serum built around amla berry as a vitamin C-focused ingredient to target dullness, uneven tone, and the look of dark spots.

rows.title: Banana Bright+ Firm and Glow Moisturizer with Vitamin C and Niacinamide
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The copy now explains why the moisturizer step matters and avoids repeating generic hydration-plus-brightening filler.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A daily moisturizer that pairs vitamin C and niacinamide with a cream step focused on hydration, glow, and smoother-looking skin.

rows.title: Peach Glaze Glow Niacinamide Serum with Vitamin C
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The second highlight now makes the hydration-heavy profile explicit instead of repeating a generic glow-and-hydration claim.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A lightweight serum that combines niacinamide, vitamin C, peach extract, hyaluronic acid, and polyglutamic acid to brighten dullness while supporting plumper-feeling hydration.

rows.title: Ultra Repair Firming Night Cream with Colloidal Oatmeal + Niacinamide
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The night-cream explanation now focuses on barrier comfort and oatmeal-plus-niacinamide substance rather than generic rich-texture copy.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: An overnight cream that pairs colloidal oatmeal and niacinamide with a rich moisturizer step focused on barrier comfort and firmer-looking skin.

rows.title: Hydra Vizor Invisible Moisturizer Broad Spectrum SPF 30 Sunscreen with Niacinamide + Kalahari Melon
rows.review_notes: Pass. The compression of moisturizer plus SPF is the real differentiator, and the wear-profile highlight is useful rather than generic.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A daily moisturizer with broad-spectrum SPF 30 that combines sun protection, hydration, and niacinamide-led skin-support benefits in one morning step.

rows.title: Daily Resurfacing Lotion with 2% Niacinamide
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The second highlight now explains the lotion-texture tradeoff in functional terms instead of sounding like format filler.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A lightweight treatment lotion built around 2% niacinamide, glycerin, and ceramides to target post-acne marks while supporting hydration and barrier comfort.

rows.title: Banana Bright+ Vitamin CC Stick
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The second highlight now ties precise placement back to dark-circle correction instead of merely stating that the item is targeted.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A targeted under-eye stick that combines vitamin C support with banana-toned pigments for immediate dark-circle correction and added hydration.

rows.title: Vitamin C Brightening Boost Moisturizer
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The texture callout now matters because it clarifies wear profile, not because gel-cream is inherently special.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A lightweight gel-cream moisturizer that uses vitamin C to combine daily hydration with a brightening, dark-spot-focused moisturizer step.

rows.title: Dark Spot Serum with Niacinamide
rows.review_notes: Pass after rewrite. The second highlight now explains the post-acne-mark treatment emphasis instead of just restating that the product is a dedicated serum.
rows.search_card_intro_candidate: A niacinamide-led serum aimed at dark spots, post-acne marks, and uneven tone, with a gentler treatment profile than a harsher acid-led discoloration serum.
